capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an upgrade and patch management service for applications, devices, and systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have an upgrade and patch management service for applications, devices, and systems?
questions.evaluation_focus: Service for applications, devices, and systems

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade and patch management service extend to the entire enterprise or a specific scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the upgrade and patch management service extend to the entire enterprise or a specific scope?

questions.prompt: Is the upgrade and patch management service reviewed frequently to assess efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the upgrade and patch management service reviewed frequently to assess efficacy?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an asset-neutral upgrade and patch management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have an asset-neutral upgrade and patch management process?

questions.prompt: Does the process apply enterprise-wide or for a specific set of assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the process apply enterprise-wide or for a specific set of assets?

questions.prompt: Is the upgrade and patch management process automated in the network?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the upgrade and patch management process automated in the network?

questions.prompt: Is the upgrade and patch management process reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the upgrade and patch management process reviewed frequently?

capability_questions.capability_name: Upgrade and patch management business process for third party and supply chain

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a third-party upgrade and patch management process?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a third-party upgrade and patch management process?

questions.prompt: Does the process apply to all third parties or specific third parties?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the process apply to all third parties or specific third parties?

questions.prompt: Is the upgrade and patch management process automated for third parties?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the upgrade and patch management process automated for third parties?

questions.prompt: Is the upgrade and patch management process for third parties reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the upgrade and patch management process for third parties reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Has the enterprise formalized and documented all KPIs and KRIs for the upgrade and patch management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate has the enterprise formalized and documented all KPIs and KRIs for the upgrade and patch management service?

questions.prompt: Are the upgrade KPIs and KRIs specific to the target systems or common across the entire enterprise scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the upgrade KPIs and KRIs specific to the target systems or common across the entire enterprise scope?

questions.prompt: Are the upgrade KPIs and KRIs reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are the upgrade KPIs and KRIs reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a centralized management server or controller that initiates and orchestrates upgrades and patches to network devices (such as an SDN controller)?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a centralized management server or controller that initiates and orchestrates upgrades and patches to network devices (such as an SDN controller)?

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade system solution cover all network devices in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the upgrade system solution cover all network devices in the enterprise?

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade system have the capability to automate upgrades and patches to network devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the upgrade system have the capability to automate upgrades and patches to network devices?

questions.prompt: Are upgrade-specific configurations on the upgrade systems reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are upgrade-specific configurations on the upgrade systems reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Can the upgrade and patch management systems be integrated with other solutions such as compliance management and vulnerability management systems to provide an end-to-end remediation system?
questions.intent: Evaluate can the upgrade and patch management systems be integrated with other solutions such as compliance management and vulnerability management systems to provide an end-to-end remediation system?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with compliance and vulnerability management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a centralized asset (infrastructure) server or controller that initiates and orchestrates upgrades and patches to endpoint devices (such as an endpoint central server)?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a centralized asset (infrastructure) server or controller that initiates and orchestrates upgrades and patches to endpoint devices (such as an endpoint central server)?

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade system solution cover all endpoint devices in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the upgrade system solution cover all endpoint devices in the enterprise?

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade system have the capability to automate upgrades and patches to endpoint devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the upgrade system have the capability to automate upgrades and patches to endpoint devices?

questions.prompt: Are upgrade-specific configurations on the upgrade systems for endpoints reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are upgrade-specific configurations on the upgrade systems for endpoints reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Can endpoint upgrade and patch management systems integrate with compliance and vulnerability management for end-to-end remediation?
questions.intent: Evaluate can endpoint upgrade and patch management systems integrate with compliance and vulnerability management for end-to-end remediation?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with compliance and vulnerability management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a centralized application server or controller that initiates and orchestrates upgrades and patches to applications, or are upgrades initiated from the respective application system controller?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a centralized application server or controller that initiates and orchestrates upgrades and patches to applications, or are upgrades initiated from the respective application system controller?

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade system solution or application controller cover all relevant application systems in the enterprise?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the upgrade system solution or application controller cover all relevant application systems in the enterprise?

questions.prompt: Does the upgrade system have the capability to automate upgrades and patches to applications?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the upgrade system have the capability to automate upgrades and patches to applications?

questions.prompt: Are upgrade-specific configurations on application upgrade systems reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate are upgrade-specific configurations on application upgrade systems reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Can application upgrade and patch management systems integrate with compliance and vulnerability management for end-to-end remediation?
questions.intent: Evaluate can application upgrade and patch management systems integrate with compliance and vulnerability management for end-to-end remediation?
questions.evaluation_focus: Integration with compliance and vulnerability management

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have upgrade and patch management policies for devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have upgrade and patch management policies for devices?

questions.prompt: Does the endpoint upgrade and patch management policy apply enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the endpoint upgrade and patch management policy apply enterprise-wide?

questions.prompt: Is the endpoint upgrade and patch management policy reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the endpoint upgrade and patch management policy reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have upgrade and patch management policies for network devices?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have upgrade and patch management policies for network devices?

questions.prompt: Does the network device upgrade and patch management policy apply enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the network device upgrade and patch management policy apply enterprise-wide?

questions.prompt: Is the network device upgrade and patch management policy reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the network device upgrade and patch management policy reviewed frequently?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have upgrade and patch management policies for applications and systems?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have upgrade and patch management policies for applications and systems?

questions.prompt: Does the applications and systems upgrade and patch management policy apply enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the applications and systems upgrade and patch management policy apply enterprise-wide?

questions.prompt: Is the application and systems upgrade and patch management policy reviewed frequently?
questions.intent: Evaluate is the application and systems upgrade and patch management policy reviewed frequently?

capability_questions.capability_name: Upgrade and patch management hierarchy model

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles device upgrades? Does the team handle all device assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles device upgrades? Does the team handle all device assets?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles network upgrades? Does the team handle all network assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles network upgrades? Does the team handle all network assets?

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles application upgrades? Does the team handle all application assets?
questions.intent: Evaluate does the enterprise have a dedicated team that handles application upgrades? Does the team handle all application assets?

capability_questions.capability_name: Upgrade and patch management service logging

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for logging upgrade and patch information to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is there a formal documented process for logging upgrade and patch information to the SOC?

questions.prompt: Is logging of upgrades and patches made securely to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate is logging of upgrades and patches made securely to the SOC?

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to the upgrade and patching process captured and transferred to the SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate are dynamic changes to the upgrade and patching process captured and transferred to the SOC?
